2605.23508.title: DrawVideo: Generating Long Video from Storyboard Keyframe Sketches
2605.23508.paper_summary: Long video generation requires high-fidelity synthesis, coherent narrative structure, and user control over extended time spans. Existing text-to-video methods often rely on a single long prompt, limiting control over pose, composition, layout, and motion. We propose DrawVideo, a sketch-guided, storyboard-driven framework for controllable long-video generation. DrawVideo decomposes long videos into independently controllable shots, each defined by a black-and-white sketch, an appearance prompt, and a motion prompt. The sketch controls pose and layout, the appearance prompt defines identity, scene, and style, and the motion prompt guides temporal dynamics. DrawVideo follows a hierarchical 'global multi-shot, local single-sketch' strategy: it first generates a structure-aligned reference keyframe, then expands the motion prompt into derivative keyframes representing action states, and finally synthesizes clips between adjacent keyframes to build each shot. We also introduce SketchLongVideo, the first dataset for sketch-guided text-to-long-video generation, constructed from animation videos via shot detection, keyframe extraction, vision-language recognition, prompt decomposition, and sketch conversion. Experiments show that DrawVideo achieves strong structural controllability, appearance consistency, visual stability, and coherent long-video generation.
2605.23508.paper_summary_zh: 長視頻生成需要高保真合成、一致的敘事結構以及用戶對於延長時間跨度的控制。現有的文本到視頻方法通常依賴於單一的長提示，這限制了對姿勢、構圖、佈局和運動的控制。我們提出了DrawVideo，一個以草圖為指導、以故事板為驅動的可控長視頻生成框架。DrawVideo將長視頻分解為獨立可控的鏡頭，每個鏡頭由黑白草圖、外觀提示和運動提示定義。草圖控制姿勢和佈局，外觀提示定義身份、場景和風格，而運動提示則引導時間動態。DrawVideo遵循一種層次化的「全局多鏡頭，本地單草圖」策略：它首先生成結構對齊的參考關鍵幀，然後將運動提示擴展為表示動作狀態的衍生關鍵幀，最後合成相鄰關鍵幀之間的片段以構建每個鏡頭。我們還介紹了SketchLongVideo，這是首個用於草圖引導的文本到長視頻生成的數據集，該數據集是通過鏡頭檢測、關鍵幀提取、視覺語言識別、提示分解和草圖轉換從動畫視頻中構建而成。實驗表明，DrawVideo實現了強大的結構可控性、外觀一致性、視覺穩定性和一致的長視頻生成。
2605.23508.author: Chuanzhi Xu et.al.
2605.23508.authors: Chuanzhi Xu, Huiqi Liang, Bang Shi, Huiming Zhang, Yifan Xiao, Guangcheng Lin, Haodong Chen, Qiang Qu, Zhicheng Lu, Weidong Cai
